title: Fraud Detection ML Pipeline
description: End-to-end machine learning pipeline for financial fraud detection. Covers data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training with class imbalance handling, and evaluation metrics focused on precision-recall tradeoff.

title: Sentiment Analysis with Transformers
description: Fine-tuning a pre-trained BERT model on a domain-specific sentiment corpus. Explores transfer learning, tokenization strategies, and inference optimization for production-like constraints.

title: EDA Framework for Tabular Data
description: Reusable Python module for automated exploratory data analysis on tabular datasets. Generates structured reports covering distributions, correlations, missing values, and outlier detection.
